name: @pryzm/engine
description: PRYZM 3 — Engine public API contracts (Sprint F-2.1). Type-only layer defining the BIM engine's public interface surface. Concrete implementations live in apps/editor/src/engine/ until Sprint F-2.2–F-2.5.

pryzm.note: Sprint F-2.1 (2026-05-15): Engine public API surface audit and interface definitions. Sprint F-2.5 (2026-05-15): Added @pryzm/views dep — ViewType, ViewMode, IViewController, IViewSwitchListener migrated to @pryzm/views; engine re-exports for backward compat. Roadmap: 51-POST-EXTRACTION-ROADMAP.md §Phase F-2.
